frontmatter.title: MCP in 2026: Durable Standard or Transitional Layer?
frontmatter.subtitle: The Model Context Protocol tripled in adoption last year. The hard questions are just starting.
frontmatter.description: MCP adoption exploded in 2025-2026, but benchmarks show CLIs outperforming MCP for agent tasks. We examine where MCP wins, where it stumbles, and whether the protocol is here to stay.
frontmatter.author: Lee Calcote
